category_sources: source_facts.description says fast, scalable JVM build tool; official Mill docs call it a better build tool for Java, Scala, and Kotlin.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub README use the display name Mill; source_facts.name is mill.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Mill site; official docs page is titled Mill Documentation and links installation and IDE setup.
repo_sources: Official Mill documentation links GitHub to com-lihaoyi/mill; the GitHub README links back to mill-build.org as documentation.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Mill as a JVM build tool for Java, Scala, and Kotlin; GitHub topics include java, scala, kotlin, build-tool, and build-system.
